; Level 2 — The Lava Gauntlet
; Format: symbol x y [width] [extra]
;   P = player start
;   # = platform (x y width height)
;   S = spike pit   (x y width height)
;   L = lava pit    (x y width height)
;   B = baby        (x floor_y min_x max_x)
;   G = goal ball   (x y color)

P 80 724

# 0    760 500 40
# 250  640 100 20
# 500  500 100 20
# 750  620 120 20
# 950  480 120 20
# 1150 380 200 20
# 1500 550 130 20
# 1200 760 400 40
# 1800 640 120 20
# 2050 500 120 20
# 2300 380 180 20
# 2650 550 130 20
# 2900 760 600 40

L 500 744 700 24
L 1600 744 200 24
L 3100 744 200 24
L 1150 648 200 60
L 2300 648 180 60

S 3500 744 200 24

B 300 760 0 500
B 300 640 250 350
B 550 500 500 600
B 810 620 750 870
B 1000 480 950 1070
B 1250 380 1150 1350
B 1550 550 1500 1630
B 1400 760 1200 1600
B 1860 640 1800 1920
B 2100 500 2050 2170
B 2950 760 2900 3500
B 3100 760 2900 3500
B 3300 760 3250 3350
B 3350 760 2900 3500

G 3300 710 blue
